title: calcearia striata
intro: Calcearia striata, also known as Chinese club moss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant belonging to the family Lycopodiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to clear heat and toxins from the body, reduce inflammation, and promote detoxification. The health benefits of Calcearia striata include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and promote overall well-being. Calcearia striata can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and pills, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
